name: Tanium
description: Endpoint management and security platform providing real-time visibility, control, and compliance across organizational infrastructure

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log into Tanium Console as Administrator
2. Navigate to Administration > Permissions > API Tokens
3. Click 'Create API Token'
4. Set appropriate scopes and expiration
5. Copy the generated token (shown only once)

credentialFields.label: Tanium Server URL
credentialFields.helpText: For Tanium Cloud: https://{tenant}.cloud.tanium.com (without /api). For on-premises: provide your full Tanium server URL

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Generate API tokens in Administration > Permissions > API Tokens

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Verifies endpoint devices are properly managed and inventoried in Tanium

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Checks that endpoints managed by Tanium are secure and compliant with organizational policies

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies monitoring capabilities and alerting configuration for security and compliance events

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews user accounts and access permissions in Tanium for proper role-based access control
